Volty U-1 // Electric Utility Vehicle

What We Are Building

The pickup truck of electric bikes.

Volty is a utility first electric motorcycle platform. It is built for work, not just commuting. A flat, modular frame wrapped around the real problems of delivery, ride hailing, and last mile logistics in Vietnamese cities.

Most electric two wheelers chase lifestyle buyers. Volty does the opposite. It is engineered for the rider who covers 200 km a day, six days a week, and who judges a vehicle by uptime, payload, and running cost.

Why Now

Adapt or exit.

Commercial fleets travel 4 times the daily mileage of private citizens. Vietnam is regulating commercial riders first, and the clock is already running.

Hanoi, Low-Emission Zones

  • Jul 2025: Directive 20/CT-TTg orders fossil fuel motorbike restrictions in Hanoi's core and a national low-emission roadmap.
  • Jul 1, 2026: the first low-emission zone goes live inside Ring Road 1, with gasoline motorbike bans that explicitly cover app based ride-hailing and delivery.
  • Jan 1, 2028: restrictions extend across Ring Roads 1 and 2; Ring Road 3 and all business use motorbikes follow by 2030.

HCMC, Fleet Conversion

  • Early 2026: new ride-hailing licenses stop being issued to gasoline motorcycle drivers under the HIDS conversion scheme.
  • 2027: gasoline motorcycles restricted during peak hours in low-emission zones, tightening through 2028.
  • End 2029: gasoline motorcycles banned entirely from ride-hailing and delivery platforms; the roadmap targets 100% of the ~400,000 driver fleet.
The government is regulating you first.

Per PM Directive 20/CT-TTg (Jul 2025), Hanoi People's Council resolution (Nov 2025), and the HCMC HIDS conversion scheme.

Why We Are Different

One bike. Every network.

VinFast and Gogoro lock riders into a single battery ecosystem. Volty is agnostic by design, the first cross compatible battery swapping utility bike in Vietnam.

Open Ecosystem

Agnostic hardware supporting multiple BaaS providers. Zero vendor lock in, maximum redundancy.

Modular Bay

Single battery for nimble urban ride hailing, or dual battery for heavy long distance logistics.

Two Minute Swap

Optimized for the rapid growth of public swap hubs at partner network locations. Swap on route, with zero range anxiety.

Closed Ecosystems

  • Tied to a single battery brand
  • One vendor sets the price
  • Coverage limited to one network
  • No fallback if a station is down

Volty, Open Platform

  • Engineered for multiple BaaS networks
  • No single battery vendor
  • Riders swap at whichever hub is nearest
  • Built in redundancy, zero lock in

One platform across every major fleet in the country, configured by accessory and powered by whichever network is nearest.

Design and Functionality

Built for the job.

Max speed80 km/h
Max torque152 Nm
Max power6 kW / 8 HP
Max range195 km
Weight, with battery120 kg
Payload200 kg
Modular

Removable rear rack for cargo or passengers, with an expandable accessory system for multi purpose work.

Comfort

Ergonomic seat designed to hold up over 12 hour delivery and ride hailing shifts.

Payload

Up to 200 kg of industrial load capacity on a flat utility platform.

Form

Two foot rest styles, motorcycle and scooter, on the same chassis.

The Expandable System
Front Cargo RackHeavy duty front platform for bulky parcels and food bags
Rear Cargo RackLoad deck behind the rider for stacked boxes and secured cargo
Mid-Cargo RackSide frames over the swingarm for panniers and balanced loads
Front Utility RackCompact front rack and footboard for quick access items
Additional Income Source

Advertising on two wheels.

The flat side cover is removable, paintable, and wrappable, a moving billboard for corporate customers. It is cheap to replace and easy to maintain, turning every fleet bike into an extra revenue line.

Configure your build

Energy without boundaries.

Technology and Systems

Swap in under two minutes.

Volty runs on battery swapping, not slow charging. Drop a depleted pack, take a charged one, and ride on. A single battery handles nimble urban work; dual batteries carry heavy logistics loads.

  • Battery standardDesigned for multi-BaaS compatibility
  • Voltage / current72V / 30Ah
  • Capacity per pack2.2 kWh
  • Real world range, dual loaded140 to 160 km
  • Charge time per battery2 to 3 hrs
  • Swap timeUnder 2 min
Public swap cabinets at partner locations

The Numbers

Run the economics.

We have modeled Volty against petrol at two levels: the take home of a single rider, and the total cost of ownership of a fleet unit across three years.
